item.title: Portable export — clawhq export
steps: Create cmd/export.go with the export subcommand
Implement bundle collector: identity files, memory archive (all tiers), workspace snapshot, config (secrets redacted), integration manifest, interaction history, build manifest
Generate README.md in bundle explaining structure and how to use with raw OpenClaw
Implement --mask-pii flag: apply PII masking throughout
Implement --no-memory flag: export only identity + config
Package as tar.gz with integrity manifest
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq export` produces a self-documented portable bundle
Bundle includes README explaining how to use without ClawHQ
Secrets are redacted from exported config
--mask-pii applies PII masking to all files
Bundle integrity can be verified via manifest hashes
